category_sources: source_facts.description: Seven Segment Optical Character Recognition; official homepage describes recognizing digits from seven-segment displays.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ssocr; current_curation.display-name is ssocr.
docs_sources: Official ssocr homepage and official ssocr manpage are the primary documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official ssocr homepage says a mirror of the development Git repository is available at GitHub and links to auerswal/ssocr.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify seven-segment optical character recognition and image input.
